title: stelis benzingii
intro: Stelis benzingii, also known as the Benzing's Stelis, is a species of orchid native to Ecuador. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis benzingii include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its use in treating various respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Stelis benzingii typically involve drying the plant's leaves and roots, which can be made into teas or infusions for medicinal purposes.
